blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
